channel.title: 2026-06-27 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-06-27 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Machine learning pipeline for denoising low signal-to-noise ratio and out-of-distribution transmission electron microscopy datasets
item.description:
📚 npj Computational Materials
👤 Brian Lee, Meng Li, Judith C. Yang, Dmitri N. Zakharov, Xiaohui Qu
npj Computational Materials, Published online: 27 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41524-026-02193-9 Machine learning pipeline for denoising low signal-to-noise ratio and out-of-distribution transmission electron microscopy datasets

item.title: 光调制木聚糖增强纳流体忆阻器用于离子神经网络驱动的机器人运动调控
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Guanghui Song, Hao Zhou, Zehui Li, Xiuru Pan, Ziwen Lv, Jun Rao, Xiang Hao, Baozhong Lü, Gegu Chen, Yupeng Chen, Feng Peng
该工作围绕一种由木聚糖增强的纳流体忆阻器展开，并强调其可受光信号调制的离子传输与记忆行为。题目表明，该器件被用于构建离子神经网络，以实现机器人运动调制；具体材料结构、性能指标和控制机制需查阅原文。

item.title: Giant Topological Hall Effect Across a Broad Temperature Window in Co‐Doped Mn3Sn Noncoplanar Antiferromagnets
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Science: Table of Contents
👤 Mingqian Zhang, Xinyu Yao, Fangyi Qi, Yalei Huang, Jincang Zhang, Kun Zhao, Guixin Cao
Advanced Science, EarlyView.

item.title: Radiation Resilient Synthetic Antiferromagnets‐Based Neuromorphic Device for Sea Surface Temperature Reconstruction
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Science: Table of Contents
👤 Mingxu Song, Jiahao Liu, Ruisheng Hu, Teng Xu, Aihua Tang, Zhihong Zhu
Advanced Science, EarlyView.

item.title: 双极轴互生铁电体用于高效稳定的光催化全水分解
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Pengwei Jia, Fang Chen, Xiaolei Zhang, Tong Chen, Xue Jiang, Tong Li, Haiyan Xie, Na Tian, Hongwei Huang
该研究聚焦于具有双极轴互生结构的铁电材料，并将其用于光催化全水分解。题目暗示材料内部极化相关结构可能有助于电荷分离和反应稳定性，从而提升光催化效率；具体合成路线、能带调控和产氢产氧数据需查阅原文。

item.title: 直写三维弯曲空心磁性纳米壳中的曲率效应探索
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Oleksii M. Volkov, Fabrizio Porrati, Florian Kronast, Riccardo Hertel, Pavlo Makushko, Olha Bezsmertna, Alexander Kuprava, Mohamad‐Assaad Mawass, Sven Barth, Michael Huth, Denys Makarov
该工作研究直接写入制备的三维弯曲空心磁性纳米壳，重点关注几何曲率对磁结构和磁响应的影响。题目表明其将纳米磁性、三维微纳加工与曲率诱导效应相结合；具体磁畴构型、实验表征和模拟结果需查阅原文。

item.title: 用于自供能宽带传感、光谱调谐和光电子突触的可重构铁电异质结构器件
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Yu‐Xuan Zhou, Shuo Li, Xuan Li, Meng‐Lan Li, XueLei Liang, Xin‐Yi Zheng, Sheng Wang, Bing‐Jie Wang, Xin‐Yue Li, Jian‐Hui Liao, Qing Chen
该研究构筑可重构铁电异质结构器件，面向自供能宽带光电传感、光谱响应调谐和类突触功能。题目显示铁电极化调控是实现多功能集成的关键；具体材料体系、响应范围和突触行为参数需查阅原文。

item.title: Secure and Intelligent IoT: A Dynamical-Systems View of Threat Modelling and Machine-Learning Defence
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Mussa Justin Muhindo
The Internet of Things (IoT) couples billions of resource-constrained devices into networkswhose behaviour evolves continuously in time. Security incidents on such networks — wormand botnet propagation, traffic-anomaly bursts, energy-depletion attacks — are, at bottom,dynamical phenomena: they are generated by rates, flows, and feedback. This paper arguesthat differential equations and machine learning are not two competing toolboxes for IoTsecurity but two representations of one object: the time-evolution of a system state x(t). Adifferential equation ̇x = f(x,θ) encodes mechanism with few interpretable parameters; aneural network trained on telemetry approximates the same vector field f from data. Modernconstructs — Neural Ordinary Differential Equations, Physics-Informed Neural Network…

item.title: Hyperbranched dielectric polymer networks exhibiting giant energy storage density at 250 °C
item.description:
📚 Nature Communications
👤 Zhaoyu Ran, Manxi Li, Li Meng, Yiwen Zhang, Yuhang Liu, Jun Hu 等8位作者
Nature Communications, Published online: 27 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-74830-2 To overcome charge transfer and achieve efficient capacitive energy storage in dielectric polymers at thermal extremes, hyperbranched networks are designed to expand inter-chain spacing and suppress secondary relaxation, delivering 4.9 J/cm³ energy density with 90% efficiency at 250 °C.

item.title: Non-Hermitian geometry reveals when quantum amplification depends only on start and end points
item.description:
📚 Physics News
In quantum mechanics, the geometry of quantum states has emerged as a powerful framework for understanding phenomena ranging from electrical conductivity to superconductivity. One research direction aims to extend these geometric concepts to non-Hermitian quantum mechanics—where systems can exchange energy with their environment—including the generalization of the Berry phase, a key geometric quantity, to the non-Hermitian case.

item.title: 通过肌纤维取向编程与磁辅助转向实现生物混合毫米机器人可控自推进
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Anping Wu, Zhengyuan Xin, Xinyi Dong, Zhiqiang Zheng, Juan Cui, Toshio Fukuda, Huaping Wang
该工作研究生物混合毫米机器人，通过肌纤维排列编程实现可控自推进，并结合磁场辅助实现方向调控。其重点在于将生物驱动单元与外场操控耦合，用于提升微小机器人运动可控性；具体结构设计、运动速度和应用场景需查阅原文。

item.title: 反向磁场诱导的三维笼型结构：一种可扩展制备微米级电磁波吸收体的路线
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Yukai Chang, Huilan Zhao, Yingjie Huo, Lei Wang, Zhikai Yan, Penghui Li, Ke Pei, Meihua Hu, Libo Wang, Qianku Hu, Aiguo Zhou, Renchao Che
该研究提出利用反向磁场诱导形成三维笼型微结构，用于构筑微米尺度电磁波吸收材料。其核心在于通过磁场调控实现可扩展结构组装，并改善电磁损耗与阻抗匹配；具体吸收带宽、反射损耗和结构参数需查阅原文。

item.title: 用于超低电导率高性能电磁干扰屏蔽的三明治结构空心玻璃微珠/有机硅复合材料
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Xinyi Ju, Chu Yao, Chao Wang, Yujie Wang, Xueliang Jiang, Feng You, Fangjun Liu, Chenjian Li, Danfeng Zhou
该研究设计空心玻璃微珠/有机硅三明治结构复合材料，面向低电导率条件下的高效电磁干扰屏蔽。工作可能强调轻质、绝缘或低漏电特性与屏蔽性能之间的平衡；具体制备路线、屏蔽机制和性能参数需查阅原文。

item.title: Defect-induced electrostatic anchoring for extreme-temperature power device encapsulation
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Laili Wang, Qi Wang, Yongmei Gan, Yisen Lv, Tianshu Yuan, Dingkun Ma 等7位作者
The transition to wide-bandgap semiconductors requires power electronics to operate reliably at extreme temperatures exceeding 250 °C. Silicone gels are essential for power-device packaging, yet they undergo accelerated dielectric degradation under such severe thermal conditions. Traditional chemical modification methods fail to withstand such extreme temperatures, inevitably compromising long-term reliability. Here, we report a modifier-free 0D/2D hybrid filler architecture within silicone gel constructed via a defect-induced electrostatic anchoring strategy. By exploiting oxygen vacancies on CeO2 nanoparticles to electrostatically capture electron-rich BN nanosheets, we establish a robust functional network devoid of thermally unstable chemicals. This hybrid architecture creates an exte…

item.title: Flexible hydrogel fiber-coupled SERS sensor for remote in situ food inspection
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Xinghua Yang, Li Li, Nikolay V Petrov, Chen Shi, Fengjun Tian, Pingping Teng 等16位作者
Optical fiber-based surface-enhanced Raman scattering (SERS) sensors offer efficient signal transmission and stable Raman enhancement, showing great potential for food safety. However, the rigidity of conventional silica fibers limits direct in situ detection on curved food surfaces, making it challenging to integrate remote signal readout and conformal sampling into a single SERS sensor. This study presents a flexible hydrogel fiber-coupled optical fiber SERS sensor. A sodium alginate-based hydrogel fiber was formed at the optical fiber tip through in situ crosslinking with calcium ions, enabling conformal contact with irregular surfaces while maintaining efficient optical transmission. The porous hydrogel structure promoted dense loading of silver nanoparticles and analyte enrichment, t…

item.title: Quantum-Accelerated Nonlinear Seismic Simulation for Megathrust-Prone Urban Environments: A Three-Order-of-Magnitude Speedup via HHL-Embedded Newton–Raphson Integration
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 PAUL RICARDO
Background: Nonlinear Time-History Analysis (NLTHA) is the most rigorous procedure for evaluating seismic structural performance, yet its O(N³) computational complexity confines its use to single-building studies, precluding real-time city-scale risk assessment in regions of high seismic hazard. Objective: This study formulates a quantum-enhanced Newton–Raphson (QNR) integration framework that embeds the Harrow–Hassidim–Lloyd (HHL) quantum linear solver within the classical Hilber–Hughes–Taylor (HHT-α) time-stepping scheme, targeting a three-order-of-magnitude reduction in wall-clock computation time. Methods: The effective tangent stiffness matrix KT ∈ ℝN×N is decomposed into Pauli operator products and mapped to a quantum Hamiltonian Ĥ. At each Newton–Raphson iteration, the residual fo…

item.title: Improvement in the bandgap and photoluminescence behavior by Holmium (Ho) and Iron (Fe) co-doping in LaNiO 3, synthesized using sol-gel route for novel sustainable energy applications
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 N S Roshima, Meenakshi R Krishnan, Jyotirmayee Satapathy
The effect of incorporating holmium and iron into LaNiO3 (LNO) perovskites with compositions, LaNi0.95Fe0.05O3 (LFNO), and La0.95Ho0.05Ni0.95Fe0.05O3 (LHFNO), synthesized via the sol-gel method are examined. Structural and morphological properties are characterized by x-ray diffraction (XRD) and Field Emission Scanning Electron Microscopy (FESEM) show a progressive distorted rhombohedral phase formation for prepared samples with particle sizes ranging from 9 to 15 nm. Fourier Transform Infra-Red (FTIR) spectroscopy, UV-Vis DRS, Photoluminescence (PL) and XPS for its structural, morphological and spectroscopic modifications owing to doping. Structural studies confirm the formation of distorted rhombohedral phases with particle sizes ranging from 9 to 15 nm, increasing with doping and then…

item.title: Clean crystal surface lets single molecules hit ultimate quantum limit
item.description:
📚 Physics News
Scientists at the Max Planck Institute for the Science of Light (MPL) have developed a technique for interrogating molecules on surfaces with spectroscopic precision, thereby reaching the ultimate quantum limit for the first time. With their findings, published in Science, the researchers open new opportunities for the study of molecule-surface interactions and molecular quantum technologies.

item.title: Semiconductor quantum dots 'reawaken' predicted Rabi oscillations, boosting quantum control
item.description:
📚 Physics News
Physicists at Paderborn University have, for the first time, experimentally demonstrated the so-called "return" of Rabi oscillations in semiconductor quantum dots. The phenomenon, which was first predicted theoretically in 2007, describes the decrease in the emission intensity of the quantum dots, which are initially damped by interactions with the lattice vibrations of a solid (phonons).

item.title: By-Layer Covalent Organic Structure as a Metal-Free PCET Catalyst for Efficient Oxygen Evolution in Alkaline and Neutral Media
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Soheila Nakhjiri Kamrani, Afshin Pashabadi, Mohammad Joshaghani
The delayed evolution of proton transfer (PT) as the sluggish component of proton-coupled electron transfer (PCET) represents a critical limitation in the design of biomimetic artificial leaves. Here, we report a simple metal-free PCET catalyst for the oxygen evolution reaction (OER) operating in both neutral and alkaline media, realized through successive evolutionary stages of a bilayer covalent superstructure. Graphite/graphene oxide hosts a repetitive porphyrin-based covalent organic structure (COS) assembled via bidentate ethylenediamine (EDA) linkages, functioning as a PCET catalyst in both alkaline and neutral environments. The experimentally detected unusual Gerischer impedance signature demonstrates the overwhelming dominance of interfacial proton exchange over natural diffusion,…

item.title: 电化学退火调控 PtCu 互锁网络，使其接近稳定氧还原反应的 Sabatier 最优状态
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Yiting Song, Heng Liu, Tianrui Xue, Xiaoqing Mao, Yongjun Shen, Di Zhang, Jialin Cui, Hao Li, Huihui Li, Chunzhong Li
该工作围绕 PtCu 互锁纳米网络的电化学退火调控展开，目标是优化氧还原反应中反应中间体的吸附强度，使催化性能接近 Sabatier 最优。由于原始摘要仅含期刊元数据，具体结构演化机制、活性与稳定性数据需查阅原文。

item.title: 具有可调介孔孔道结构的纳米限域单原子网络用于稳定类芬顿催化
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Yueping Bao, Yunlu Cao, Lifang Zhai, He Zhang, Xinying Chen, Zhengkun Wang, Menglu Zhang, Ying Luo, Yan Meng, Wen‐Wei Li, Wei Chen
该工作围绕纳米限域单原子网络催化剂展开，通过调控介孔孔道结构提升类芬顿反应的稳定性和反应效率。研究重点可能包括单原子位点稳定、传质通道优化与活性物种生成调控；具体催化体系、降解对象和循环性能需查阅原文。

item.title: Quantifying the Security-Performance Trade-off in Constrained IoT: A Multi-Vector MQTT Attack Framework with Hybrid Defense-in-Depth Evaluation
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Thant Zin Moe, Julia Juremi, Manimegalai Rajenderan
The Message Queuing Telemetry Transport (MQTT) protocol is the de facto standard for machine-to-machine (M2M) communication in Internet of Things (IoT) deployments. However, existing security research treats protocol-level vulnerabilities and physical-layer attack vectors as isolated domains, leaving a critical and unexplored intersection: the chained, multi-vector threat in which a physical Human Interface Device (HID) intrusion serves as the initial foothold for a subsequent MQTT network compromise. This paper presents a reproducible experimental framework that designs, executes, and defends against exactly this attack chain using three low-cost hardware components: a Raspberry Pi Pico (RP2040), ESP8266 NodeMCU, and Arduino UNO (ATmega328P) as a representative legacy device. Three mitig…
